actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour id=1602679153 on PrefabInstance 1781955274 (child of Temple 259640721) uses script guid=39f8a5a2b11c2426cb2a2bea3e825751 (Door). Scene config assigns open_fail_sound guid=b6a0517e9a9d14b7b8fd6be65f68f1a5 and open_success_sound guid=e5a423fc890c5445fb9c3b126422891b. Prefab has a Collider (BoxCollider size modified) and Has_Rigidbody=false, so Trigger interactions are valid.
Allow time for Door to complete Opening motion (slide_speed=2.0, offset=7.0 => ~3.5s). After waiting, close the door.
Allow time for Door to complete Closing motion (~3.5s). Then attempt to open again without returning to Closed state to exercise failure branch.

actionUnits.condition: Ensure the Crystal can be interacted with. MonoBehaviour id=791898217 uses script guid=7ec1f4a241dbe3243aed64a4afbc8b66 (Crystal). Start() disables MeshCollider at runtime; MakeClickable() must enable it before pointer events. Crystal has MeshCollider (id=791898213) and EventTrigger (id=791898216), so Trigger interactions are valid.

Simulate EventTrigger PointerClick (EventTrigger id=791898216, eventID=4) whose m_Calls invokes Crystal.Touch on MonoBehaviour id=791898217. Allow time for greeting audio to finish so speechBubble Canvas can be enabled.
Invoke TakeCoins to branch based on coins in scene. If any GameObjects tagged 'Coin' exist, dialog_fail is shown; otherwise dialog_teleport is shown.
Invoke Teleport regardless of dialog state to exercise teleport sound and _teleporting flow. Allow time for teleport_sound to finish so Update() sets dialog_end active and resets _teleporting.
Restart the scene to exercise SceneManager.LoadScene(0). Place last to avoid interrupting prior steps.
